comment.body:
Man. Alma stated multiple times. "WE 👏 ARE 👏 GOING 👏 TO 👏 LEARN 👏 MULTIPLE 👏 WAYS 👏 TO 👏 TRADE." 

For example: 
We had like a two week period with reversion signals daily - due to the fact that we've been learning about this specific way of trading. Now the market is wicked. Don't you prefer to wait until it settles, at least a bit? Before we move on with next stuff, like footprints, flow, etc? I personally can't wait, but I do understand this is not the right time to do that. As for the reversion bands - in April I'm 30% up on depo, trading only small futures.

Alma said "this substack will be for 1-1,5 years". How can one say "oh, after it ends you'll shit yourself". I mean, how can you tell, what's in her plan. And I guess, we can agree she has one, right? 
A list of things to learn, which she throws at us. The more we catch, the better. 

By spending small part of todays wins I just ordered for my dog a big bag of bull dicks, chopped into small pieces. They smell horribly but Taco loves 'em. Kinda ironic I took shorts today... Anyways, If I was to attempt teasing Alma into a meeting (in Cracow which she visits), I wouldn't do it for the private lessons. My instinct taught by grandma would be to feed her cause she's family. And I make some decent kardemummabullar, from recipe by some Swedish dude who won some title of best baker in the world or a few years ago. Or that gal I took cooking classes from lied about working at his place.

comment.body:
You guys need to chill 😂. The outrage culture on this sub is approaching levels of the American far left.

I am not saying Alma’s analysis isn’t great. For how much you all can contextualize Alma’s very complex analysis, it seems impossible for any of you who are attacking me to contextualize what I’m actually saying.

I have stated numerous times Alma has talent, however, talent isn’t valued because it can be easily replicated. So, what happens next year when you don’t have Alma’s macro analysis, proprietary gamma levels, her daily analysis, her weekly analysis, etc? 

You guys are praising her for being a “furu”, yet she stated many times when she started this Sub that she wants to teach, and to teach us to be self sufficient. It seems with each passing week you all are becoming more and more reliant on her analysis, like a lost infant searching for their “mommy”. You are learning to implement her analysis. But implementing someone else’s analysis is FAR different than creating that analysis itself.

All I’m saying is, what good is it to become reliant on a furu when they are leaving in less than a year?

I wouldn’t mind just having her as my paid “quant” if that’s what she is selling. But she didn’t set that expectation.

Funny how you all talk smack about “your trades are your responsibility”, which is true. But then when I say I’d like to have more educational content to become more responsible and self sufficient, you all go into a crazy outrage and start attacking me. Ridiculous. 

These conversations are exhausting. If you guys can’t contextualize this then I don’t believe any of you are able to piece together Alma’s analysis. I say this as respectfully as possible, given the disrespect I have received.
